message:
feat: add GitHub social preview image (1280x640)

Generate gh_og_share_image.png from the UBS illustration using
the gh-og-share-images skill. Shows the scanning robot with
language badges and "Ultimate Bug Scanner v5.0" branding for
clear social media recognition.

To activate: GitHub Settings > Social preview > Edit > Upload

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
